goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'acorn guest house'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'ely'.
The train should 'arrive by 18:15' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called acorn guest house
Make sure you get phone number and star of the hotel
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from ely
The train should arrive by 18:15 and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get departure time
